---
title: "Results draft"
output: pdf_document
date: "2024-07-23"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
library(here)
```


```{r analysis-preferences}
# Seed for random number generation
set.seed(42)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache.extra = knitr::rand_seed)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  comment = '', out.width = "425px")
```

## Analysis 

- Detail categorization procedure


## Results 

Figure 1 shows the breakdown of participant categorizations.
Half of the participants showed evidence of a DPBE, making them appropriate for subsequent within-subjects analyses.
The 30 participants with no effect were not include in the within subjects-analysis, which was designed to determined which language-specific phonemic boundary is more similar to a novel language's, since their Spanish and English was not distinct (enough) to determine whether their "L3" was closer to one or the other.

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(here("new_docs", "img", "flow_chart.png"))
```

**Breakdown of L1 and "L3" for participants with the DPBE**
```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(here("new_docs", "img", "dpbe_ppts.png"))
```

**Group-level S-shaped curve for all 30 DPBE ppts**
```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(here("new_docs", "img", "dpbe_ppts_s.png"))
```

**Group-level S-shaped curve for all 31 non-DPBE ppts**
```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(here("new_docs", "img", "dpbe_no_ppts_s.png"))
```


**Breakdown of L1 and "L3" for participants with a Spanish-like L3**
```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(here("new_docs", "img", "dpbe_span_ppts.png"))
```

**Group-level S-shaped curve for all Spanish-like boundaries**
```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(here("new_docs", "img", "dpbe_ppts_sb.png"))
```

**Breakdown of L1 and "L3" for participants with a English-like L3**

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(here("new_docs", "img", "dpbe_eng_ppts.png"))
```

**Group-level S-shaped curve for all English-like boundaries**

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(here("new_docs", "img", "dpbe_ppts_eng.png"))
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(here("new_docs", "img", "dpbe_ppts_eng_ind.png"))
```

**Supplementary plots**

N/A participants who had more than one continuum step between both their L3 and L1/L2 and was not intermediate of them both. 

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(here("new_docs", "img", "na_bar_ppts.png"))
```
```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(here("new_docs", "img", "na_ppts_s.png"))
```
